author: vvo
subject: v1.2.3
body: ## [1.2.3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.2.2...v1.2.3) (2016-02-18) ### Bug Fixes * **currentRefinedValues:** clear numeric refinements using original value ([9a0ad45](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/9a0ad45)), closes [#844](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/844)
